pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-A-002 (AI and Machine Learning/Ability) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.421, highest: O*NET at 0.421). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.421, and AI and Machine Learning (AI) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this AI and Machine Learning KSA (composite 0.421)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Manager job postings does not surface this AI and Machine Learning competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
